character_buff.name: Comina Pontus
character_buff.description: Finds calm amidst the waves of battle, but becomes vulnerable to electric magic damage.

effects: Duration: 240 seconds
ATK against monsters +40%
Increases physical penetration by 1 for every 20% ATK against monsters
Electric magic damage taken +10%
Strengthens [Lindemary] stance skills
Deals 2x skill damage to monsters in [Berlonia Plena] state (5x if large)

stances.name: Bare Knuckle
lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [STR]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 3% DMG according to extra [STR]

stances.name: Lindemary

skills.name: Vienis
skills.description: Marks a distant enemy with the Ice Butterfly. The marked target is put in [Berlonia] state.

effects: On hit, increases enemy [Berlonia] level by 1
[Berlonia] can increase up to level 3
At level 3, [Berlonia] changes to [Berlonia Plena]
In [Comina Pontus] state, hitting an enemy in [Berlonia Plena] state removes [Berlonia Plena]
[Strength Remove] removes [Berlonia Plena]
On hit, increases enemy [Berlonia] level by 1
[Berlonia] can increase up to level 3
At level 3, [Berlonia] changes to [Berlonia Plena]
In [Comina Pontus] state, hitting an enemy in [Berlonia Plena] state removes [Berlonia Plena]
[Strength Remove] removes [Berlonia Plena]

skills.name: Felipeze
skills.description: Leaps to a designated point and attacks enemies within range. On hit, the caster receives a [Destruido] buff proportional to skill level and becomes invincible for 1 second.

effects: Activates skill when reused during casting
Increases knockdown distance, knockdown time, and damage proportional to casting time
Additional damage increases up to 8x at maximum casting
Ignores additional defense up to 80 (up to 40 for PCs, not applied in World Cross PVP rule)

skills.description: Attacks the enemies in front with the Ice Butterfly.

In [Destruido] state, ignores additional defense equal to (extra [Strength] * 1.25) against monsters
Reduces all skill cooldowns by 1 second proportionate to the number of hits on enemies in [Berlonia Plena] state

skills.name: Karkiola
skills.description: Annihilates enemies within range. If Gaura in a calm state is within the range, grants beneficial effects to squad members in the skill area.

effects: Ignores evasion
On hit, increases enemy [Berlonia] level by 2
In [Destruido] state, ignores additional defense equal to (extra [Strength] * 1.25) against monsters
Deals 1.5x damage to enemies in [Cold], [Frost], [Freeze], [Pain] state
33% chance to reset [Felipeze] cooldown when hitting enemies in [Berlonia Plena] state
If caster has [Comina Pontus], grants [Calm of the Waves] to up to 7 squad members except the caster when hitting enemies
